name_en: Basilica of Our Lady of the Pillar
name_local: Basílica de Nuestra Señora del Pilar

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum entrance is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde se encuentra la entrada al museo?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh seh en-KWEN-tra lah en-TRAH-dah al moo-SEH-oh?

likely_response.local: Por la puerta sur, junto a la sacristía.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah SOOR HOON-toh AH LAH sahth-ree-STÍ-ah
likely_response.translation_en: In the cloister, follow the yellow signs.

responses.english: In the cloister, follow the yellow signs.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah SOOR HOON-toh AH LAH sahth-ree-STÍ-ah
responses.french: Por la puerta sur, junto a la sacristía.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main altar is
phrases.text_local: ¿Cómo llego al altar mayor de la basílica?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿KO-mo ya-GO al al-TAR ma-YOR deh la ba-SEE-lee-ka?

likely_response.local: Recto, al final de la nave central.
likely_response.pronunciation: REHTH-toh AHL fee-NAHL DEH LAH NAH-beh thehnt-RAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Straight ahead, at the end of the central nave.

responses.english: Straight ahead, at the end of the central nave.
responses.phonetic: REHTH-toh AHL fee-NAHL DEH LAH NAH-beh thehnt-RAHL
responses.french: Recto, al final de la nave central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿se permite tomar fotografías dentro?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, ¿seh pehr-MEE-teh to-MAHR fo-to-gra-FEE-as een-TRO?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tower elevator is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está el ascensor para subir a la torre?
phrases.pronunciation: DÓN-deh EHSTÁ EHL ah-sthehn-SOHR PAH-rah soo-BEER AH LAH TOHR-reh

likely_response.local: Cerca de la salida, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: THEHR-kah DEH LAH sah-LEE-dah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Near the exit, on the right.

responses.english: Near the exit, on the right.
responses.phonetic: THEHR-kah DEH LAH sah-LEE-dah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Cerca de la salida, a la derecha.
